data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_4.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_4F_Text_Att: Hmm...\pAn attacking move...\nOr a defensive move...\pIt's no easy matter to decide which TM\nmoves should be taught to POKéMON...
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_4.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_4F_Text_Fif: There are so many different kinds of\nTM moves.\pA catalog I read said there are fifty\ndifferent kinds.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_4.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_4F_Text_Pok: I'd like to get all the different TMs,\nbut a POKéMON learns only four moves.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_4.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_4F_Text_Unu: A SHORTCUT TO POKéMON LEAGUE\n4F: TM CORNER
